tool.privacy: 100% private — runs in your browser, nothing is uploaded

footer.privacyNote: All tools run client-side. Your data never leaves your device.

about.title: About
about.heading: About DevTools
about.description: DevTools is a free collection of fast, privacy-first developer utilities that run entirely in your browser — no sign-up, no tracking, no data uploaded.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How DevTools handles your data: tools run entirely in your browser, nothing you paste is uploaded, and we set no tracking cookies.

home.metaDescription: A fast, free collection of developer tools — JSON formatter, Base64, JWT decoder, cron generator and more. Everything runs in your browser; your data is never uploaded.
home.heroSub: Fast, clean, ad-light utilities for everyday development. Everything runs in your browser — your data is never uploaded to a server.

categoryDesc.data: Format, convert and inspect structured data.
categoryDesc.encoding: Encode, decode and escape data safely.
categoryDesc.design: Pick, convert and build colors, gradients and palettes.
categoryDesc.web-security: Tokens, hashes, networking and authentication helpers.
categoryDesc.time-ids: Work with time, schedules and identifiers.
